h2: Take it home today with free order & collect in as little as an hour! Subject to availability
h3: Amazing Mac. Surprising price. Pre-order MacBook Neo from £599.
Fast runs in the family. Save up to £400 when you trade in your old Mac.

notes: Homepage uses demandware platform. robots meta tag says noindex,nofollow,noarchive (likely anti-scraping measure, not the real robots directive). Title from raw HTML metadata is the authoritative source.
